dataset_name: National Flood Hazard Layer local GeoJSON snapshot
license_terms_notes: License, reuse terms, attribution requirements, and exact download lineage have not yet been documented by a named human reviewer.
coverage_area: The local file contains flood polygons used for Alameda County checks, but exact official coverage must be confirmed in the FEMA viewer.
intended_claim: Whether the saved address point intersects a loaded FEMA flood polygon, including Special Flood Hazard Area attributes when present.
prohibited_claims: A non-match does not establish overall flood risk for the property.
This is not a parcel, insurance, elevation-certificate, or building-specific determination.
notes: Checksum, record count, and embedded CRS were calculated from the repository file. Effective date, exact download URL, official viewer comparison, and dataset lineage remain unverified.

agency: California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection
dataset_name: Fire Hazard Severity Zones local GeoJSON snapshot
license_terms_notes: License, reuse terms, attribution requirements, exact edition, and download lineage have not yet been documented by a named human reviewer.
coverage_area: The local file contains California fire hazard polygons, but Alameda County completeness and the applicable SRA/LRA edition must be confirmed in the official viewer.
intended_claim: Whether the saved address point intersects a loaded moderate, high, or very-high Fire Hazard Severity Zone polygon.
prohibited_claims: A non-match does not mean wildfire, smoke, ember, evacuation, or power-shutoff impacts are impossible.
The layer does not predict when a fire will occur or the damage a specific building will experience.
notes: Checksum, record count, and embedded CRS were calculated from the repository file. Exact official edition and human viewer comparison remain unverified.

agency: United States Geological Survey and contributing California Geological Survey records
dataset_name: Mapped fault traces local GeoJSON snapshot
license_terms_notes: Agency ownership, collaborator records, reuse terms, exact edition, and download lineage require named human review.
coverage_area: The local file includes mapped fault traces used for Bay Area proximity context; completeness for Alameda County has not been human-verified.
intended_claim: Distance from the saved address point to the nearest valid loaded mapped fault trace.
prohibited_claims: Fault proximity is not Alquist-Priolo zone membership.
Fault proximity does not determine shaking, liquefaction, landslide, building damage, or overall earthquake safety.
notes: Checksum, record count, and embedded CRS were calculated from the repository file. Exact service lineage and official viewer comparison remain unverified.

license_terms_notes: Copyright 2025 California Department of Conservation, California Geological Survey. Personal use is permitted; publication requires the attribution specified in the official ArcGIS item license.
coverage_area: Published California Alquist-Priolo Earthquake Fault Zones; automated use in StayReady is limited to Alameda County addresses.
intended_claim: Whether the saved address point intersects the official CGS mapped Alquist-Priolo surface fault rupture regulatory zone service.
prohibited_claims: This layer does not determine general earthquake risk or predict shaking damage.
A non-match does not establish overall earthquake, fault-movement, or seismic risk.
This is not a site-specific engineering, legal, insurance, disclosure, or property determination.
result_label: Inside a CGS mapped Alquist-Priolo fault rupture zone.
source_summary: CGS maps regulatory zones where surface fault rupture investigation requirements may apply.
notes: Official public-authoritative CGS ArcGIS service. StayReady status remains provisional until known Alameda County locations are compared with the official viewer.

license_terms_notes: Official California Department of Conservation public map service. The service metadata does not state separate reuse terms; use remains informational with agency attribution.
coverage_area: Populated California coastal areas evaluated for tsunami evacuation and response planning, including mapped Alameda County shoreline areas.
intended_claim: Whether the saved address point intersects a CGS polygon labeled Yes, Tsunami Hazard Area for evacuation and response planning.
prohibited_claims: This result is for evacuation and response planning, not a legal or property disclosure determination.
A non-match does not establish overall tsunami, coastal flooding, access, utility, or indirect-impact risk.
This is not a live warning or emergency evacuation order.
result_label: Inside a CGS mapped tsunami hazard area.
source_summary: CGS tsunami hazard areas support community evacuation and response planning for maximum considered tsunami scenarios.
notes: Official CGS map service. StayReady status remains provisional until known Alameda County shoreline locations are compared with the official viewer.
